description: Planning-only Sense360 room-bundle fan-control variant candidates (ROOM-BUNDLE-FAN-VARIANTS-001). This file proposes optional fan-control add-on variants for the Bathroom and Kitchen PoE room bundles ONLY (OPTION A: kept in a separate file so the stable room-bundle matrix in config/room-bundle-skus.json stays clean). It is documentation / planning metadata, not firmware: it adds no product YAMLs, firmware config strings, WebFlash wrappers, firmware builds, artifacts, releases, or stable promotions, and it does NOT imply WebFlash exposure. Base room bundles in config/room-bundle-skus.json remain the main product line; these variants are optional add-ons. Relay, 0-10V (DAC), and PWM control are NOT interchangeable at runtime. Bundle SKUs remain separate identifiers from firmware config strings. No fan variants are proposed for Corridor/Landing, Living Room, or Bedroom, and no TRIAC (S360-320) customer-facing fan variant is proposed. The variants stay planning-only until their fan-driver evidence gates close. See docs/sense360-room-bundles.md.

fan_variant_candidates.name: Bathroom Bundle, PoE + Relay Fan Control
fan_variant_candidates.notes: Optional add-on to the stable Bathroom PoE bundle. Relay on/off fan control (S360-310). Planning-only; no firmware/WebFlash promotion.

fan_variant_candidates.name: Bathroom Bundle, PoE + 0-10V Fan Control
fan_variant_candidates.notes: Optional add-on to the stable Bathroom PoE bundle. 0-10V (GP8403 DAC) fan control (S360-312). Planning-only; no firmware/WebFlash promotion.

fan_variant_candidates.name: Bathroom Bundle, PoE + PWM Fan Control
fan_variant_candidates.notes: Optional add-on to the stable Bathroom PoE bundle. 12V PWM fan control (S360-311). Planning-only; no firmware/WebFlash promotion.

fan_variant_candidates.name: Kitchen Bundle, PoE + 0-10V Extract Control
fan_variant_candidates.notes: Optional add-on to the Kitchen PoE bundle. 0-10V (GP8403 DAC) extract / MVHR / EC boost control (S360-312), NOT generic cooker-hood control. Planning-only; no firmware/WebFlash promotion.

fan_variant_candidates.name: Kitchen Bundle, PoE + Extract Relay
fan_variant_candidates.notes: Optional add-on to the Kitchen PoE bundle. Relay extract / MVHR / EC boost control (S360-310), NOT generic cooker-hood control. Planning-only; no firmware/WebFlash promotion.
